internal fun Json.switchMode(desc: SerialDescriptor): WriteMode =
    when (desc.kind) {
        is PolymorphicKind -> WriteMode.POLY_OBJ
        StructureKind.LIST -> WriteMode.LIST
        StructureKind.MAP -> selectMapMode(desc, { WriteMode.MAP }, { WriteMode.LIST })
        else -> WriteMode.OBJ
    }

internal val isPrimaryConstraintWillBeDefined: Boolean
        get() = when {
            currentDialect is SQLiteDialect && columnType.isAutoInc -> false
            table.isCustomPKNameDefined() -> isLastColumnInPK
            isOneColumnPK() -> false
            else -> isLastColumnInPK
        }

when (this) {
  is BooleanExpression.And -> "and"
  is BooleanExpression.Or -> "or"
  is BooleanExpression.Not -> "not"
  is BooleanExpression.Element -> "element"
  BooleanExpression.False -> "false"
  BooleanExpression.True -> "true"
}

while (true) {
    consumeWhitespaces()
    if (peekNextOrNull() != 'a') break
    consumeNext()
    assert(consumeNext() == 'n')
    assert(consumeNext() == 'd')
    condition = And(condition, nextRelation())
}

when {
    dpi <= LDPI.dpi -> LDPI
    dpi <= MDPI.dpi -> MDPI
    dpi <= HDPI.dpi -> HDPI
    dpi <= XHDPI.dpi -> XHDPI
    dpi <= XXHDPI.dpi -> XXHDPI
    else -> XXXHDPI
}

when {
    density <= 0.75 -> LDPI
    density <= 1.0 -> MDPI
    density <= 1.5 -> HDPI
    density <= 2.0 -> XHDPI
    density <= 3.0 -> XXHDPI
    else -> XXXHDPI
}
